To determine this, we need to look at the "score" column where numerical values are embedded in strings (like "w 22–13" indicating 22 points). We should extract the numerical values representing the team's score and then sort these values in ascending order ("small to large") using the f_sort_column(score) operation to see when the score reaches at least 20 points.

The question asks how many games occurred before the team scored at least 20 points in a single game. Since each row represents a game with its corresponding score, we need to check the "score" column to identify which games had scores of at least 20 points and count how many games preceded them. The team scored 22 points in game 4 (w 22-13), which is at least 20 points. This means it took 4 games before the team reached or exceeded 20 points in a game.
